---
title: "Welcome to DINA-Web"
output: html_document
---

![DINA-Web Logo](http://www.dina-project.net/w/media/thumb/1/14/DINALogo.png/272px-DINALogo.png)

The following services are currently available from DINA-Web:

- <https://dina-web.net/loan>
- <https://dina-web.net/loanadmin>
- <https://dina-web.net/inventory>
- <https://dina-web.net/dnakey>
- <https://dina-web.net/naturarv>

- <https://issues.dina-web.net>
